agreement.full_name: Preferential Trade Agreement between Türkiye and Pakistan

notes: CONFIRMED SPECIAL SHAPE by direct inspection - this differs from every other PTA config: (1) HS code for search/loading purposes should be Column C (8-digit FBR transposition to match Pakistan-side codes), NOT column B (12-digit Turkish GTIP) - column B stored as hs_code_alt_12digit_turkish and should ALSO populate hs_transpositions table per schema Section 9, since this workbook explicitly is the FBR 12<->8 digit transposition source referenced in the Schema Companion Guide. (2) Row 4 shows staging_horizon of 11 years (Year-1 through Year-11), not the 10 years assumed elsewhere - corrected here to staging_horizon_yrs=11. (3) anniversary_day/month = 1 May confirmed directly from row 4's remarks text ('each new tariff-year taking effect on 1st May'). (4) Remarks column (H) contains embedded rate-component text like 'Concession modality: %50 MFN; AFL in selected date: 11,5%' - this single visible sheet only shows ONE point-in-time rate (date-driven, Excel formula), same problem as China: FLAGGED - a hidden per-year/per-component raw sheet analogous to China_Raw was NOT found in this workbook during the original deep-scan (Turkey PTA showed no hidden sheets besides a standard Helper_Internal). This means the year-by-year CD/RD/ACD breakdown may only exist in the visible sheet's live-formula behavior, not as static hidden data - FLAGGED for follow-up investigation before this module can actually be loaded correctly; the config as written can only capture the CURRENTLY DISPLAYED single-date rate, not the full phased schedule the schema's tariff_rates table is designed to hold.
